title: Apollo Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Apollo Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at Apollo Hospitals are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Apollo Hospitals:
Apollo Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
